Package microui.event

Class Event

java.lang.Object
microui.event.AbstractEventSystem
microui.event.Event
public final class Event extends AbstractEventSystem
Concrete implementation of AbstractEventSystem providing direct access to all mouse event states. This class serves as a convenient wrapper for detecting various mouse interactions with SpatialView components.

The Event class provides simple boolean methods to check for different mouse events without needing to access the internal detector directly. It's designed for easy integration into component update loops.

See Also:
  • AbstractEventSystem
  • SpatialView

    Event(SpatialView spatialView)
    Constructs an Event detector for the specified SpatialView.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    isClick()
    Checks if a click event occurred (press and release while hovering).
    boolean
    isDoubleClick()
    Checks if a double-click event occurred (two clicks within time threshold).
    boolean
    isDragEnd()
    Checks if a drag end event occurred (mouse released after dragging).
    boolean
    isDragging()
    Checks if the mouse is currently dragging this component.
    boolean
    isDragStart()
    Checks if a drag start event occurred (mouse moved while pressed).
    boolean
    isEnter()
    Checks if a mouse enter event occurred (mouse moved into component bounds).
    boolean
    isEnterLong()
    Checks if an enter-long event occurred (mouse hovered for extended duration).
    boolean
    isHover()
    Checks if the mouse is currently hovering over this component.
    boolean
    isLeave()
    Checks if a mouse leave event occurred (mouse moved out of component bounds).
    boolean
    isLeaveLong()
    Checks if a leave-long event occurred (mouse stayed out for extended duration).
    boolean
    isLongPress()
    Checks if a long-press event occurred (mouse held for extended duration).
    boolean
    isPress()
    Checks if a mouse press event occurred in the current frame.
    boolean
    isPressed()
    Checks if the mouse is currently pressed on this component.
    boolean
    isRelease()
    Checks if a mouse release event occurred in the current frame.
    boolean
    isReleased()
    Checks if the mouse is currently released (not pressed) on this component.

  • Constructor Details

    • Event

      public Event(SpatialView spatialView)
      Constructs an Event detector for the specified SpatialView.
      Parameters:
      spatialView - the SpatialView to monitor for events (cannot be null)

  • Method Details

    • isPress

      public boolean isPress()
      Checks if a mouse press event occurred in the current frame.
      Returns:
      true if mouse was pressed while hovering over the component

    • isRelease

      public boolean isRelease()
      Checks if a mouse release event occurred in the current frame.
      Returns:
      true if mouse was released after being pressed on the component

    • isLongPress

      public boolean isLongPress()
      Checks if a long-press event occurred (mouse held for extended duration).
      Returns:
      true if mouse was pressed and held beyond the long-press threshold

    • isEnter

      public boolean isEnter()
      Checks if a mouse enter event occurred (mouse moved into component bounds).
      Returns:
      true if mouse entered the component's bounds in the current frame

    • isLeave

      public boolean isLeave()
      Checks if a mouse leave event occurred (mouse moved out of component bounds).
      Returns:
      true if mouse left the component's bounds in the current frame

    • isEnterLong

      public boolean isEnterLong()
      Checks if an enter-long event occurred (mouse hovered for extended duration).
      Returns:
      true if mouse hovered over component beyond the enter-long threshold

    • isLeaveLong

      public boolean isLeaveLong()
      Checks if a leave-long event occurred (mouse stayed out for extended duration).
      Returns:
      true if mouse stayed out of component bounds beyond the leave-long threshold

    • isClick

      public boolean isClick()
      Checks if a click event occurred (press and release while hovering).
      Returns:
      true if a complete click action was performed on the component

    • isDoubleClick

      public boolean isDoubleClick()
      Checks if a double-click event occurred (two clicks within time threshold).
      Returns:
      true if two clicks were detected within the double-click threshold

    • isDragStart

      public boolean isDragStart()
      Checks if a drag start event occurred (mouse moved while pressed).
      Returns:
      true if mouse started dragging from this component

    • isDragging

      public boolean isDragging()
      Checks if the mouse is currently dragging this component.
      Returns:
      true if mouse is currently dragging the component

    • isDragEnd

      public boolean isDragEnd()
      Checks if a drag end event occurred (mouse released after dragging).
      Returns:
      true if mouse stopped dragging this component

    • isPressed

      public boolean isPressed()
      Checks if the mouse is currently pressed on this component.
      Returns:
      true if mouse is currently pressed while hovering over the component

    • isReleased

      public boolean isReleased()
      Checks if the mouse is currently released (not pressed) on this component.
      Returns:
      true if mouse is not pressed or not hovering over the component

    • isHover

      public boolean isHover()
      Checks if the mouse is currently hovering over this component.
      Returns:
      true if mouse cursor is within the component's bounds
